mano_cua.result_summary: 宽屏模式下（通过Cmd+-缩小模拟更宽视口）内容块两侧出现大量空白区域（左侧sidebar到content约400px空白，右侧content到屏幕边缘也有大量空白），布局未自适应宽屏。由于文档极长（Huge Document），60步硬超时未能完整滚动到底部确认底部空白问题
mano_cua.last_reasoning: CRITICAL VISUAL BUG OBSERVED: The content block is positioned significantly to the LEFT-CENTER of the available viewport, leaving large amounts of blank/white space on both the left (between sidebar and content) and to the right of content. This blank space becomes MORE noticeable as the viewport gets wider (zoom out). The layout does not responsively adapt to wider viewports.
